text: GOAL! Erling Haaland taps it in from close range! Manchester City lead 2-1!
Yellow card for Declan Rice after a late challenge on Rodri.
What a save! Neuer denies Vinicius Jr from point blank range!
GOAL! Pedri with a stunning volley from outside the box! Barcelona 1-0 Atletico!
Ronaldo is brought down in the box! Penalty to Al-Nassr!
Corner kick for Liverpool. Salah whips it in...
Red card! The defender leaves Mbappe with no choice — dangerous tackle, straight red!
Substitution: Rashford comes on for Bruno Fernandes for Manchester United.
FULLTIME! Al-Hilal win 3-2 in a dramatic finish! What a match!
Offside! Benzema's goal is ruled out by VAR.
GOAL! هالاند يسجل مجدداً! مانشستر سيتي يتقدم 1-0!
بنزيمة يُهدر فرصة سهلة أمام المرمى. ما كان يجب أن يُخطئ هكذا.
رونالدو يسجل من ركلة الجزاء! الهدف الأول له في هذه المباراة.
Foul by Casemiro on Diaz. Free kick for Liverpool in a dangerous position.
GOLAZO! Lamine Yamal curls it into the top corner! The crowd goes absolutely wild!
